meaning: n.不重要的角色,冗员vt.用冷纱布贴(书背)vi.充当跑龙套的角色adj.上等的,特大的,特级的,十分的,过分的,极好的adv.非常 /n.上标/下标
examples: I'm going to Greece in the summer so I've got to be super slim.
Sater has covered many international weather stories including Super Typhoon Haiyan in November 2013.
The Super League champions overcame wild and windy conditions, with Kevin Sinfield's kicking proving vital.
